acceptance_item: Actual Truehost Starter account passes Python App, DB, Cron, SMTP/IMAP, SSL, resource and backup preflight.
Production/staging apps, DBs, secrets, files and mail interception are isolated.
Django 5.2 LTS compatible patch and pinned dependencies install without compilation.
No external runtime service, CDN, AI, queue, analytics or monitoring dependency exists.
Database/file/inode baseline and capacity thresholds are green with required reserve.
Cron schedule is staggered, leased and bounded on the actual account.
Build identifier, release manifest and rollback package are complete.
Maintenance, deploy, rollback and recovery procedures are rehearsed.
Invitation-only accounts, MFA, session revocation, lockout and step-up tests pass.
Role, record, field and portal object authorization matrices pass.
HTTPS, cookies, CSRF, CSP and other security-header profile pass.
XSS, SQL injection, header injection, open redirect and unsafe deserialization tests pass.
File upload/download controls block unsafe corpus and prevent public-path access.
Secrets are absent from code, logs, support bundles and test data.
Audit events are complete and tamper-evident verification runs.
Consent, DNC, purpose suppression, unsubscribe and privacy-case workflows are approved.
Retention schedule, legal-hold behavior and export approvals are approved.
No unresolved critical/high security issue; medium findings have owners and accepted treatment.
Canonical data dictionary and required/custom fields are approved.
Source inventory and migration mapping cover all authoritative legacy data.
Duplicate clusters/merge decisions are reviewed for high-risk records.
Migration dry runs reconcile counts, values, statuses, owners, files and rejects.
Production migration is checkpointed/idempotent and records remain held until release.
Imported records do not trigger unapproved outbound communication.
Legacy source freeze/delta and rollback point are documented.
Database growth projection remains within 425 MB critical threshold for planned horizon.
Customer 360, timeline, search, consent, files, duplicate and merge journeys pass.
Lead intake from each approved source creates one assigned actionable lead.
Response SLA, qualification, conversion and source attribution reconcile.
Opportunity stages enforce evidence, owner/next action and history.
Quote version, approval, issue, expiry and won/lost behavior pass.
Won handoff creates one complete onboarding/success/renewal chain.
Onboarding templates, portal inputs, blockers, progress and completion pass.
Support intake, threading, priority, SLA, waiting, resolve/reopen and knowledge pass.
Survey delivery, signed response, fatigue and low-score recovery pass.
Health, risk plan, renewal, churn, win-back and advocacy suggestion pass.
Dashboards reconcile to drilldowns and permission-safe exports.
Portal core journeys pass mobile/accessibility and cross-customer isolation.
SMTP/IMAP test mailboxes connect, send, receive, dedupe and recover on failure.
Message threading and inbound reply stop future generic sequence reliably.
Transactional outbox and idempotency survive forced crash without duplicate effect.
Suppression, purpose, low-feedback hold, quiet hours and frequency caps apply to manual and automated sends.
Hard/soft bounce behavior and invalid-address suppression pass.
All 28 default workflows pass simulation, stop, retry, dead-letter and authorization tests.
Workflow activation, rollback, in-flight policy and dependency analysis pass.
Emergency stop halts new automated external effects within one cron interval.
Outbox respects 60/hour and 10/5-minute internal limits and provider headroom.
No mass-mail recipient upload or arbitrary bulk-send path exists.
Model/feature registry and model cards exist for every active intelligence use case.
No customer data leaves the Truehost account for AI processing.
Core operation degrades to rules/manual queues when AI is disabled.
Predictions include version, feature snapshot, confidence, reasons, expiry and feedback path.
Observation/recommendation/automation tier is enforced and high-impact actions are prohibited.
Candidate evaluation uses time-safe holdout, baseline and minimum sample gates.
No model auto-promotes; artifact checksum, approval, rollback and drift monitoring pass.
Severe misclassification/model incident runbook is exercised.
Web/search/mutation performance targets pass at representative dataset and mixed load.
15-session capacity and cron contention test meets error/resource thresholds.
WCAG 2.2 AA applicable journeys, keyboard, zoom and 360px tests pass.
Supported browser matrix passes core staff/portal journeys.
Queue/mailbox/DB/files/inodes/logs/backups appear correctly in health dashboard.
Backups are verified; selected set restores within RTO and meets measured RPO.
Housekeeping, archive retrieval and retention dry run pass.
Security/operations/model/mail/capacity incident exercises are complete.
Runbooks and role-specific staff guides are complete and controlled.
All staff accounts, roles, MFA, ownership, delegation and manager coverage are ready.
Company configuration decisions in Section 19.4 are signed.
Templates, sender identities, DNS/mail authentication and test sends are approved.
UAT-01 through UAT-15 are accepted by named business owners.
No release-blocking defect or unapproved exception remains.
Cutover, rollback, customer/staff communications and hypercare ownership are confirmed.
Production smoke tests pass with customer effects intercepted.
Controlled activation and observation thresholds are approved.
